indapex.dose_note: Note: Very atypical dosing curve, caution is advised.
indapex.name: indapex

properties.dose: Oral Light: 60-75mg Common: 75-100mg Strong: 100-150mg. | Note: Very atypical dosing curve, caution is advised.
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: 5-MEO-TMT is one of Alexander Shulgin's lesser known discoveries. A psychedelic tryptamine with very limited information on its effects on humans.
